label: Shippo
description: Connect to Shippo's multi-carrier shipping API to create labels, track shipments, and manage carriers.

form.title: Connect Shippo
form.subtitle: Paste your Shippo API token to start creating labels and tracking shipments.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your Shippo live or test API token (starts with `live_` or `test_`). Found in goshippo.com → Settings → API. Simplest and fastest setup path.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Shippo API Token

1. Log in to [goshippo.com](https://app.goshippo.com).
2. Click your account name or avatar in the top-right corner, then go to **Settings**.
3. Select the **API** tab in the left sidebar.
4. You'll see two token types:
   - **Test token** (starts with `test_`) — safe for development; no real shipments.
   - **Live token** (starts with `live_`) — use for production shipments.
5. Copy the token you want to use and paste it into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- Tokens are long-lived but can be regenerated in the same Settings → API panel at any time. If you regenerate, update the token here.
- Use the **test_** token while setting up Anton to avoid accidental live charges.
- Shippo rate-limits requests per API key; see [Shippo API docs](https://docs.goshippo.com/docs/api_concepts/apicalls/) for limits.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Your Shippo API token from goshippo.com → Settings → API. Starts with `live_` for production or `test_` for sandbox.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Choose Live for real shipments or Test to use sandbox mode. Should match the prefix of your API token.
